title: Why This Training Matters
description: Understand the business drivers for implementing a standardized Salesforce commercial process across the NxN organization.

sections.title: Welcome
sections.content:
Welcome to the NxN Salesforce Commercial Process Training. We're implementing one unified way of working across our entire commercial journey—and this training ensures everyone in the sales process, from lead intake through contract execution, understands how to use Salesforce effectively.

The goal is simple: build a stronger commercial engine through consistency, control, and visibility.

sections.title: Why This Matters Now
sections.content:
Today, without standardized processes, we face challenges:

• Different approaches to managing leads, opportunities, and contracts across regions and teams
• Data quality issues that make reporting unreliable
• Governance gaps that create risk and missed opportunities
• Limited visibility into what's actually happening in the pipeline

Salesforce gives us the infrastructure. This training gives you the playbook.

By implementing one standard process—with consistent terminology, clear rules, and shared accountability—we unlock better decision-making, faster sales cycles, and higher-quality revenue.

sections.title: The Three Pillars
sections.content:
Everything in this training rests on three outcomes:

Consistency
Every sales professional follows the same process, in the same system, with the same terminology. Whether you're in New York or Singapore, closing a $10K or $10M deal—the process is identical. This means customers experience a unified NxN brand, managers can apply consistent accountability, and the organization can scale without confusion.

Control
Governance checkpoints and approval gates ensure deals move forward only when they're ready. Stage gates enforce specific readiness criteria. Contracts validate signature authority. Quotes require pricing approval. Duplicates get caught and merged. This layer of control protects us from errors, compliance violations, and unauthorized commitments.

Visibility
When everyone captures data the same way, leadership sees the full pipeline picture. Accurate forecasting becomes possible. Bottlenecks emerge. Patterns surface. Visibility flows from clean data, consistent record-keeping, and real-time reporting that reflects the true state of business.

sections.title: What You'll Learn
sections.content:
This training walks the entire customer journey—from prospect to lead to active customer. You'll discover:

• The complete journey and how each stage connects to the next
• Who owns what at each step and why those roles matter
• How leads flow through the system and when they move to opportunities
• What account structures look like and how they drive revenue accuracy
• Which approval gates exist and what they protect
• How quotes, contracts, and documentation work together
• Where data quality is critical and how it affects the business

By the end, you'll understand not just *what* to do in Salesforce—but *why* each step exists and how it contributes to NxN's commercial success.

keyTakeaways: Consistency: Every sales professional follows the same process using the same system and terminology, enabling scalable operations and unified brand experience
Control: Governance checkpoints and approval gates protect the company from pricing errors, regulatory violations, and unauthorized commitments
Visibility: Clean data and consistent record-keeping enable accurate forecasting, identification of bottlenecks, and informed business decisions
